business_ideas.idea: Network-based comedians' platform competing with Netflix for comedy specials distribution.
Vampire attacks on competitor networks by recruiting key network nodes strategically.
Photo sharing platform emphasizing social features over content storage.
Personality quiz platform (Tickle) monetizing novelty and viral virality.
Gaming company leveraging network effects and social gameplay mechanics.

predictions.text: Network effects and long-term thinking will create defensibility moats for surviving founders.
Companies with 10+ year horizons significantly outperform short-term optimization strategies.
Language and naming strategy drives 3-5x variance in user acquisition costs across products.
